<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 192 192" width="192" height="192">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="192" height="192" rx="40" fill="#1a1a2e"/>

  <!-- Subtle gradient overlay -->
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="glow" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#533483" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1a1a2e" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="micGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e94560"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#533483"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="192" height="192" rx="40" fill="url(#glow)"/>

  <!-- Mic body -->
  <rect x="76" y="36" width="40" height="72" rx="20" fill="url(#micGrad)"/>

  <!-- Mic stand arc -->
  <path d="M 56 104 Q 56 140 96 140 Q 136 140 136 104"
        fill="none" stroke="url(#micGrad)" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Mic stand pole -->
  <line x1="96" y1="140" x2="96" y2="160" stroke="url(#micGrad)" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Mic base -->
  <line x1="72" y1="160" x2="120" y2="160" stroke="url(#micGrad)" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Sound wave dots -->
  <circle cx="44" cy="96" r="5" fill="#e94560" opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="32" cy="96" r="4" fill="#e94560" opacity="0.35"/>
  <circle cx="148" cy="96" r="5" fill="#e94560" opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="160" cy="96" r="4" fill="#e94560" opacity="0.35"/>
</svg>

feat: add Hey Chill voice-first PWA

Minimal, beautiful single-page PWA for voice-first AI agent interaction.

webhook posting, message history, settings modal, and full PWA manifest
with service worker for offline shell caching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
## Status
DONE

## What Changed
- `index.html` — Single-page app shell: header with settings gear, scrollable message history, live transcript overlay, transcript bar with Send/Discard, hero mic button, not-supported banner, settings modal
- `style.css` — Dark theme (#1a1a2e), mobile-first layout with dvh, pulsing mic ring animation, recording glow, slide-up message animations, safe-area insets for notch phones
- `app.js` — Web Speech API integration (continuous + interim results), toggle-to-record with 2s silence auto-stop, webhook POST with JSON payload, message history with status badges, localStorage settings, service worker registration
- `manifest.json` — PWA manifest with name "Hey Chill", short_name "Chill", theme_color "#1a1a2e", both icon sizes, standalone display
- `sw.js` — Cache-first service worker for app shell (cache-on-install), skipWaiting + clients.claim for immediate activation, offline fallback to index.html, passthrough for non-GET/cross-origin (webhook POSTs)
- `icons/icon-192.svg` — SVG mic icon, dark bg with red-to-purple gradient, 192×192
- `icons/icon-512.svg` — Same design scaled to 512×512 for Lighthouse

## Key Decisions
- Used toggle-tap (not hold-to-talk) as primary UX — more comfortable for mobile; hold-to-talk feels awkward for longer dictation
- Auto-stop after 2s of silence so users don't have to tap again after a natural pause
- `recognition.continuous = true` with interim results gives real-time live transcript feel
- SVG icons (not PNG) — zero dependencies, infinitely scalable, tiny file size; Chrome/Edge accept SVG in manifests

result:
## Status
DONE

## What Changed
- `index.html` — Single-page app shell: header with settings gear, scrollable message history, live transcript overlay, transcript bar with Send/Discard, hero mic button, not-supported banner, settings modal
- `style.css` — Dark theme (#1a1a2e), mobile-first layout with dvh, pulsing mic ring animation, recording glow, slide-up message animations, safe-area insets for notch phones
- `app.js` — Web Speech API integration (continuous + interim results), toggle-to-record with 2s silence auto-stop, webhook POST with JSON payload, message history with status badges, localStorage settings, service worker registration
- `manifest.json` — PWA manifest with name "Hey Chill", short_name "Chill", theme_color "#1a1a2e", both icon sizes, standalone display
- `sw.js` — Cache-first service worker for app shell (cache-on-install), skipWaiting + clients.claim for immediate activation, offline fallback to index.html, passthrough for non-GET/cross-origin (webhook POSTs)
- `icons/icon-192.svg` — SVG mic icon, dark bg with red-to-purple gradient, 192×192
- `icons/icon-512.svg` — Same design scaled to 512×512 for Lighthouse

## Key Decisions
- Used toggle-tap (not hold-to-talk) as primary UX — more comfortable for mobile; hold-to-talk feels awkward for longer dictation
- Auto-stop after 2s of silence so users don't have to tap again after a natural pause
- `recognition.continuous = true` with interim results gives real-time live transcript feel
- SVG icons (not PNG) — zero dependencies, infinitely scalable, tiny file size; Chrome/Edge accept SVG in manifests
